summary: Iteration 2 focused testing on 3 new features (password-reset flow, event registration confirmation email, Landing mobile hamburger). Backend: 6/6 new pytest cases passed (forgot-password existing+non-existent, reset-password bad-token/valid/reuse, event register 200). Frontend: /forgot-password submit shows forgot-sent-msg, /reset-password client-side mismatch blocks submit, /login forgot-link navigates to /forgot-password, Landing mobile hamburger (414x800) opens mobile-menu with About/Events/Team + Sign In/Join, close button removes menu. All 30 pytest tests (prior 24 + new 6) pass. Resend warnings logged for non-owner addresses (test-mode, expected) — API still returns 200 as per review-request guidance.

minor.issue: reset link embedded in outgoing email uses Origin/Referer header value — works for browser-initiated requests but emails triggered from non-browser contexts (e.g. server-to-server) would produce a link with an empty base. Consider reading REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL or PUBLIC_BASE_URL from env as a fallback.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py forgot_password builds reset_link from request.headers Origin/Referer — if the email client follows a link from a context where Origin is missing/stripped, base will be empty. Safer to derive from an env var (PUBLIC_BASE_URL) with header as fallback.

reset_password does not enforce minimum password length server-side (UI hints min 6 but Pydantic model lacks constraints). Low risk for this MVP but recommend adding min_length=6 validation on ResetPasswordIn.
password_reset_tokens collection has no TTL index — expired tokens accumulate. Consider a MongoDB TTL index on expires_at for auto-cleanup.
Event registration email send is fire-and-forget via asyncio.create_task; Resend test-mode WARN is swallowed into logs only (acceptable per review_request).
No rate-limit on /auth/forgot-password — could be abused to flood emails / enumerate indirectly via timing. Recommend simple per-IP throttle.
test_credentials: core@themomentclub.in / admin123 (seeded core_team); dynamic TEST_ users per run
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_fp_*, TEST_rp_*, TEST_regmail_* members and one TEST_REG_EMAIL_* event (event is deleted on cleanup; member docs remain but are prefixed TEST_ for easy cleanup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py now has 3 new classes: TestForgotPassword, TestResetPassword, TestEventRegistrationEmail. They use pymongo directly to read the reset token from MongoDB (MONGO_URL/DB_NAME from env). Resend is in test-mode; expect WARN logs for addresses other than the Resend-account owner (lakshya8586@gmail.com) — backend still returns 200. Mobile hamburger tested at 414x800 viewport.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA — iteration-2 features all verified working.
